%%{init: {'theme': 'default', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#f5f5f5', 'primaryTextColor': '#333333', 'primaryBorderColor': '#cccccc', 'lineColor': '#666666', 'secondaryColor': '#f0f0f0', 'tertiaryColor': '#ffffff' }}}%% stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> Pending: Create Comment Pending --> Approved: Approve Pending --> Rejected: Reject Pending --> Deleted: Delete Approved --> Deleted: Delete Rejected --> Deleted: Delete Deleted --> [*] state Pending { [*] --> AwaitingModeration AwaitingModeration --> [*] } state Approved { [*] --> Visible Visible --> Edited: Update Edited --> Visible } state Rejected { [*] --> Hidden Hidden --> WithReason: Add Rejection Reason WithReason --> [*] } note right of Pending: Comments start in Pending state
and await moderation note right of Approved: Approved comments are visible
and can be edited note right of Rejected: Rejected comments are hidden
with optional rejection reason note right of Deleted: Deleted comments are
permanently removed

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个评论状态流转图，核心状态有三个：Pending（待审核）、Approved（已通过）、Rejected（已拒绝），还有一个Deleted（已删除）作为终态。用户创建评论后先进入Pending。
明白了。Pending状态内部需要细化吗？比如是否需要区分刚创建和正在审核中的子状态？
需要，Pending内部要有AwaitingModeration子状态，表示等待审核中。另外Approved内部也要有Visible和Edited两个子状态，因为通过的评论可以被编辑。Rejected内部则是Hidden和WithReason，拒绝时可以填写拒绝原因。
好的，我梳理一下：Pending可以Approve、Reject或Delete；Approved和Rejected也都可以Delete；Deleted直接到终态。Approved里的Visible和Edited可以互相转换，Rejected里Hidden可以加上WithReason。对吗？
对的，但注意Edited只能回到Visible，不能反向直接触发其他状态。还有，每个主状态右侧需要加注释说明，比如Pending要注明"Comments start in Pending state and await moderation"。
图已经画好了，四个主状态都加了右侧注释。配色用了浅灰背景#f5f5f5，边框#cccccc，整体风格比较简洁。你看看还有什么要调整的吗？
Rejected的注释有点问题，应该是"Rejected comments are hidden with optional rejection reason"，你写的是"with reason"不够准确，要强调是optional的。另外Deleted的注释"permanently removed"前面换行显示不太对。
已修复，Rejected注释改成"with optional rejection reason"，Deleted的换行也调整了。现在所有状态和流转都符合要求了。
